active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 15 is K2-first: add a bounded, traceable, fail-closed hybrid tool-selection boundary inside the opt-in kernel before any executable diagnostic planner proposal. Keep benchmark gold fields in eval-only sidecars and preserve default kernel-off public behavior.

objective: Implement and prove the minimal K2 hybrid selection boundary for the real opt-in MemoryOS v3 kernel path, then permit only source-grounded diagnostic maintenance proposals that cannot execute or contain benchmark gold fields.
implementation_order: RED: add focused K2 candidate/selection/fail-closed tests before production changes.
GREEN: wire deterministic candidates and constrained selection into SimpleAgentStepRunner.run_step() on the opt-in kernel path.
REFACTOR: keep candidate/selector contracts focused and durable in v3 contracts or one small helper.
GATE: prove K2 selection inputs and traces are bounded and default public kernel-off behavior remains unchanged.
CONDITIONAL: only after the K2 gate passes, plan and add diagnostic-only planner proposals with eval-only sidecars and gold_fields_used=false.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: Add a RED test proving the kernel emits a deterministic candidate-generation trace before any selected tool is evaluated by policy.
Add a RED test proving a selector cannot choose an unregistered or non-candidate tool and that denial occurs before policy, execution, verification, or memory mutation.
Add a RED test proving invalid selector output or selector failure resolves to deterministic no-op/fail-closed behavior without memory mutation.
Add a RED test proving selected tool traces/requests retain selection_origin and candidate_reason.

If planner work is admitted after K2: add RED tests proving model-visible proposal input excludes expected answers, expected_source_ids, judge labels, gold-derived repair ids, and case-specific repair ids.
benchmark_and_smoke_commands: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge

eval_routing.reason: K2 initially changes only the explicitly enabled kernel selection and trace path. A LoCoMo diagnostic replay is needed only if the conditional planner/report path is implemented; it cannot establish quality promotion.
eval_routing.milestone_if_required: If default retrieval, context composer, answer projection, judge, or scoring changes, review must run parallel LongMemEval and LoCoMo full-chain LLM judge evaluation under the milestone policy.

usable_ack_checklist: Implementation is on the real opt-in SimpleAgentStepRunner/public kernel path, not a demo helper.
Deterministic candidates, constrained selection, fallback/deny, and trace provenance are tested.
Non-candidate, invalid, unavailable, timeout, missing-provenance, and policy-denied paths cannot mutate memory.
Default public benchmark behavior remains kernel-off and v3 default/v1 fallback are preserved.
Planner artifacts, if implemented, separate eval-only gold sidecars from source-grounded executable payloads and assert gold_fields_used=false.
Case-level evidence separates LoCoMo localization and judge outcomes and does not claim improvement from LongMemEval alone.
result.md, execute_review.md, review_verdict.json, and ack.json cite this context bundle and active goal.
review_focus: Whether K2 is wired before any planner execution boundary.
Whether selector validation denies invented tools and invalid payloads before policy/execution.
Whether trace provenance includes selection_origin and candidate_reason.
Whether any gold-bearing benchmark field enters model-visible selection or executable proposals.
Whether default kernel-off, v3 default, and v1 fallback remain unchanged.
Whether evaluation claims remain conservative for LoCoMo and pass-to-fail evidence.
non_goals: Do not enable MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 by default.
Do not add Phase 16 tool surface or direct core edits.
Do not add Letta as a dependency.
Do not treat diagnostic smoke or same-slice repairs as benchmark promotion.
Do not use benchmark answer/source/judge gold fields to form executable memory actions.
